scripts.test: npm run test:wat && npm run test:watwat-probe && npm run test:assert-probes && npm run test:coverage-selftest
scripts.test:watwat-probe: node tools/watwat.js --expect-failure probe_assert_eq_i32_failure "deliberate i32 failure" dist/wasm/watwat.test.wasm
scripts.test:assert-probes: node tools/watwat.js --expect-failure probe_assert_eq_i32_failure "assert test failed" dist/wasm/std/assert.test.wasm && node tools/watwat.js --expect-failure probe_assert_eq_i64_failure "assert test failed" dist/wasm/std/assert.test.wasm && node tools/watwat.js --expect-failure probe_assert_eq_f64_failure "assert test failed" dist/wasm/std/assert.test.wasm && node tools/watwat.js --expect-failure probe_assert_eq_str_length_failure "assert test failed" dist/wasm/std/assert.test.wasm && node tools/watwat.js --expect-failure probe_assert_true_failure "assert test failed" dist/wasm/std/assert.test.wasm && node tools/watwat.js --expect-failure probe_assert_false_failure "assert test failed" dist/wasm/std/assert.test.wasm
scripts.coverage: npm run build:cov && npm run test:coverage
scripts.coverage:strict: npm run build:cov && npm run test:coverage:strict
